prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A white cartoon duck with a mischievous grin, holding a colorful plastic toy knife with bright red handle and silver-painted blade near its face. The toy knife has a harmless cartoonish look. Bold black ink outlines, comic-style hatching shadows. High contrast purple and lilac lighting from below. Background of deep purple and lavender radial speed lines, clean composition, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只白色卡通鸭带着调皮坏笑，将一把彩色塑料玩具刀（亮红色刀柄，银色涂漆刀刃）举近脸旁。玩具刀看起来无害卡通化。粗黑墨水勾边，漫画风格排线阴影。高对比度紫色与丁香光从下方打亮。背景为深紫与薰衣草放射线速度线，干净构图，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. A white cartoon duck with narrowed scheming eyes, clutching a toy dagger with dark purple handle and light grey plastic blade close to its beak. Cartoonish proportions, clearly a toy. Bold outlines, dramatic ink-wash hatching. High contrast violet and magenta accent lighting. Background of royal purple and pink sunburst speed lines, no body.
prompt_zh: 美式复古漫画波普风格，1：1正方形头像极近特写。一只白色卡通鸭眯着算计的眼睛，将一把深紫色刀柄、浅灰色塑料刀刃的玩具匕首握近鸭嘴。卡通比例，明显是玩具。粗黑轮廓，戏剧性墨水排线阴影。高对比度紫罗兰与品红点缀光。背景为皇紫与粉色放射线速度线，无身体。

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. Bold outlines, clean comic shading. High contrast deep purple and lime green lighting. Background of dark magenta and chartreuse radial speed lines, no body.

prompt: American retro comic book pop-art style, 1:1 square headshot extreme close-up. Bold outlines, clean flat pop-art colors. High contrast electric purple and hot pink lighting. Background of vivid purple and magenta sunburst speed lines, extremely readable, no body.
